title: M-g-2 general-purpose warhead launcher
content:
{{Top|canon=M-g-2 general-purpose warhead}}
The '''M-g-2 general-purpose warhead launcher''' was manufactured by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] for use in the [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE/ad Avenger]] and [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]]. The launcher's magazine could be loaded with 4 [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]], 3 [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]], 2 [[Proton rocket/Legends|proton rockets]], or 1 [[Proton bomb/Legends|space bomb]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
*{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}} {{Mo}}
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]''
